untranslatable_reason: Signal requires fundamental metrics (5-year growth rate, quarterly earnings deceleration, relative strength rank) and 52-week high detection which are NOT available in the allowed indicator set. Only technical price and moving average conditions could be approximated.
translation_notes: Converted available technical conditions: (1) Price below 20-day MA as proxy for uptrend break, (2) RSI < 50 as proxy for loss of relative strength, (3) Recent sharp downward reversal approximated by close < prev_high. Cannot express: 5-year growth rate, earnings deceleration, relative strength percentile ranking, or 52-week high reversal pattern. Exit condition uses technical mean reversion (close crosses above MA) as reasonable reversal proxy given the 30-day hold max.
